tweet.text: RT @Kim2933sing: News of Johnny & his brother is 💔I am devastated for his family Ashley& I got quite a few chances to watch Johnny Calgary,…
A great player and an even better person. My heart is with the Gaudreau family today and everyday 💔 https://t.co/niioAYNKcH

I am excited to again launch "SPECIAL OLYMPICS TACKLING INCLUSION" during the 2024 season. Please click on the link to learn about my campaign and why I'm supporting Special Olympics Colorado this season https://t.co/7vIz6385it @SpecOlympicsCO @Broncos @BroncosOffField
RT @CofDead1: Happy @NHLFlames🔥 HOME OPENER🏒 tag 🏷️ us in a pic 📸 from The Dome for dat https://t.co/QfXKLk9iUj promo code🧑‍💻👌#yyc #flames…
Hate seeing Danny go down! I hope he is okay guy is a dog!
Road to recovery starts now! Thank you everyone for the positive vibes and prayers today. Going to attack this like everything else full speed! Go Broncos!! https://t.co/944vIwbNkz
